Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 2 0 0}{f 4 23 0 202 0 25 25}With so many students and desks, it's no wonder there's hardly any space between them...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_000_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 4 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 3 0 0}But perhaps... Ah, I see. It's designed this way to foster a sense of harmony between classmates.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 4 0 0}{f 4 23 0 202 1 25 25}I can sense the care put into this arrangement.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 5 0 0}This observation post must be what they call a "podium."[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 6 0 0}Hm, interesting... When I stand here, I do feel a longing to teach well up inside of me.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 9 0 0}Between Diet Food and Super Diet Food... which is more delicious?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 11 0 0}{f 4 23 0 202 0 25 25}As a penalty for giving the wrong answer, you shall receive your own portion of Diet Food.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}※未使用メッセージラベル。[cr][n]※これが表示されたらバグです。[cr][n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 13 0 0}{f 4 23 0 202 0 25 25}As a reward for giving the correct answer, you shall receive your own portion of Super Diet Food.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_007_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}※未使用メッセージラベル。[cr][n]※これが表示されたらバグです。[cr][n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_008_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 14 0 0}Is this what a classroom lecture is like?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 15 0 0}...The quizzical stares are beginning to make me feel unsettled. Let us carry on with the tour.[n]{f 1 1}
